name: Service 1st
description_short: Service 1st Credit Union offers checking, savings, CDs, and loan products including auto loans, personal loans, and credit cards to members nationwide with access to 40,000+ ATMs.
description_long:
Service 1st Credit Union is a federally insured financial cooperative that provides traditional banking and lending services to its membership base. The institution operates as a full-service credit union with a digital presence at service1stcu.org and maintains connections to a large ATM network. Founded on credit union principles, Service 1st focuses on member financial goals through accessible loan and savings products.

The credit union's service portfolio spans multiple lending categories: personal loans starting at 9.24% APR, new and used vehicle loans as low as 1.99% APR, motorcycle financing for both new and used Harley-Davidson motorcycles, bad credit loans for members with lower credit scores, share-secured loans, and credit cards. On the savings side, they offer Platinum Checking with 0.05% APY, Money Market accounts (0.15%-0.45% APY), and Certificate of Deposit (CD) products with terms ranging from 12 to 60 months at rates up to 2.10% APY.

Service 1st distinguishes itself through niche financing options uncommon at traditional banks, particularly specialized Harley-Davidson motorcycle loans at competitive rates (4.00%-4.25%). The institution explicitly markets bad credit loans and share-secured lending, indicating deliberate outreach to members with credit challenges. Their participation in shared branching and ATM networks provides members with nationwide access despite operating as a smaller regional credit union. All rates advertised include a 0.25% discount for automatic payment enrollment.

As a credit union, Service 1st operates under member-ownership principles rather than shareholder models, theoretically aligning incentives with member benefit. However, the publicly available website offers limited detail on membership eligibility, account minimums, fees, or full product terms. Current CD rates and savings yields remain modest relative to online-only banking competitors, and personal loan rates start at 9.24%, higher than some alternative lenders. The website lacks transparency on approval timelines, required credit scores for specific products, or detailed fee structures.
services: New Harley Motorcycle Loans (4.00% APR minimum)
Used Harley Motorcycle Loans (4.25% APR minimum)
pros: Access to 40,000+ free ATMs nationwide through shared branching network
Competitive auto loan rates as low as 1.99% APR with 0.25% auto-pay discount
Specialized Harley-Davidson motorcycle financing unavailable at most banks (4.00%-4.25%)
Explicit bad credit loan products designed for members with lower credit scores
Share-secured lending option allowing collateralized loans against member deposits
Member-owned credit union structure with non-profit operational model
Multiple savings vehicles including Money Market and CD terms up to 60 months
cons: Savings rates (0.05%-2.10%) significantly lag high-yield online banking alternatives
Personal loan entry rate of 9.24% is higher than many online personal loan lenders
Website provides minimal transparency on membership eligibility, account fees, or approval criteria
Limited information on loan approval timelines or required credit scores by product
No visible mobile app, account opening process, or digital banking feature details
best_for: Credit union members seeking motorcycle financing with competitive Harley-specific rates
Borrowers with fair or poor credit seeking bad credit loans and membership-based lending
Vehicle buyers wanting auto loans with discounts for automatic payment enrollment
Members prioritizing nationwide ATM access and shared branching convenience
diagnosis: Service 1st Credit Union is best for existing or prospective members seeking auto financing, motorcycle loans, or credit-building products through a member-owned cooperative rather than a traditional bank. Primary caveat: savings rates and personal loan APRs are not competitive with digital-first online lenders, and the website lacks sufficient transparency on fees, membership requirements, and approval processes to fully evaluate product value.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Service 1st — Credit Union in Danville, PA | CreditDoc
meta_description: Service 1st — NCUA-insured credit union in Danville, PA. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
